name: Milo
description: Shopkeeper, messy light brown hair, wears a faded blue apron with pockets, carries an empty wicker basket on his arm, scuffed leather boots

name: Elara
description: Healer, long braided silver hair, wears a soft green linen robe, has a small pouch of healing herbs hanging from her belt, barefoot

name: Gareth
description: Blacksmith, muscular build, shaved head with a scar across his left cheek, wears a soot-stained leather apron, calloused hands, heavy work boots

name: Toby
description: Beggar, messy unkempt brown hair, wears a patched tattered grey cloak, bare feet, carries a chipped wooden bowl

name: Lila
description: Child, wild curly red hair tied back with a yellow ribbon, wears a too-big tunic that used to belong to an adventurer, carries a wooden sword, scuffed boots

name: Alaric
description: Village Chief, long white beard, wears a simple brown wool robe, carries a wooden staff carved with runes, soft leather shoes
